selection.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.

messages.content:
Produce your very own perspective on the given topic. Align tone and examples with the persona's background and traits. Focus on discussing your topic. Avoid bullet points. Produce continuous prose. Write at least 250 words, up to 500 words.

OUTPUT FORMAT (STRICT):
Return ONLY a single-line JSON object, with no extra text, no markdown, no comments.
Here is the required structure example (values are placeholders):

response_raw:
{
"mode": "human",
"topic": "How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.",
"opinion": "Social media platforms have made it incredibly easy to spread misinformation, but there are steps you can take to protect yourself. Firstly, be critical of the information you consume, verify sources before sharing anything, and fact-check everything. Secondly, use privacy settings to control who can see your content and data. Thirdly, limit your time on social media and avoid engaging with fake news. Lastly, educate yourself about fake news and how it spreads so that you can be better equipped to deal with it. By taking these steps, you can significantly reduce the amount of fake content you see on social media and protect yourself from its harmful effects."
,"reasoning_summary": "To manage and deal with fake content on social media, firstly, be critical of information consumed, verify sources before sharing anything, fact-check everything. Secondly, use privacy settings to control who can see your content and data. Thirdly, limit time on social media and avoid engaging with fake news. Lastly, educate yourself about fake news and how it spreads so you can be better equipped to deal with it.",

response_parsed.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.
response_parsed.opinion: Social media platforms have made it incredibly easy to spread misinformation, but there are steps you can take to protect yourself. Firstly, be critical of the information you consume, verify sources before sharing anything, and fact-check everything. Secondly, use privacy settings to control who can see your content and data. Thirdly, limit your time on social media and avoid engaging with fake news. Lastly, educate yourself about fake news and how it spreads so that you can be better equipped to deal with it. By taking these steps, you can significantly reduce the amount of fake content you see on social media and protect yourself from its harmful effects.
response_parsed.reasoning_summary: To manage and deal with fake content on social media, firstly, be critical of information consumed, verify sources before sharing anything, fact-check everything. Secondly, use privacy settings to control who can see your content and data. Thirdly, limit time on social media and avoid engaging with fake news. Lastly, educate yourself about fake news and how it spreads so you can be better equipped to deal with it.
